description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a tall, dense green hedge, creating a private yard. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, white facade with large windows and sliding glass doors that open to outdoor living spaces. The front includes a driveway leading to a carport, while the backyard offers a patio area with outdoor seating and a hot tub. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple bedrooms and bathrooms. The landscaping is minimalistic, with paved walkways and a small lawn area. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a private yard enclosed by a green hedge. Features include a driveway, carport, patio, and open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and large windows facing the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and the open-plan living area with access to the backyard patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, hot tub, outdoor seating, and large sliding glass doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio, hot tub, and additional access points to the interior from the yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
